twitter_thread: Vim loads 25% slower with 10 plugins. Drew DeVault's AI-free version loads in 12ms.
DeVault strips Vim to its core, ditching plugins like YouCompleteMe and instead using Vim's built-in autocomplete.
This approach requires manually setting up 5 key mappings and writing 20 lines of Vimscript.
Result: 30% faster load times and a 40% reduction in memory usage for some users.
However, mastering Vimscript takes time, with most users needing 10-20 hours of practice to become proficient.
DeVault's approach is not for beginners, but for those willing to invest time, it can lead to a highly optimized editing experience.
What's the one feature you wish your text editor had, and would you trade plugins for speed? #vim #texteditors
